message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #000000
skinparam lifelineFontColor #000000
skinparam lifelineFontSize 14
skinparam lifelinePadding 10
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowFontSize 14
skinparam arrowFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowFontStyle plain
skinparam arrowFontName Arial
skinparam arrowTextAlign center
skinparam arrowTextPadding 5
skinparam arrowTextMargin 5
skinparam arrowTextOffset 0
skinparam arrowTextRotation 0
skinparam arrowTextWrap false
skinparam arrowTextOverflow ellipsis
skinparam arrowTextMaxWidth 0
skinparam arrowTextMinWidth 0
skinparam arrowTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam arrowTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextHangingIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextFirstLineIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextLastLineIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextAllLinesIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoHangingIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoFirstLineIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoLastLineIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoAllLinesIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextNoIndentation 0
skinparam arrowTextNoHangingIndentation 0
skinparam arrowTextNoFirstLineIndentation 0
skinparam arrowTextNoLastLineIndentation 0
skinparam arrowTextNoAllLinesIndentation 0
skinparam arrowTextNoIndentations 0
skinparam arrowTextNoHangingIndentations 0
skinparam arrowTextNoFirstLineIndentations 0
skinparam arrowTextNoLastLineIndentations 0
skinparam arrowTextNoAllLinesIndentations 0

actor "actorName" as actor1
participant "CLI" as cli
participant "Web" as web
participant "adc" as adc

box "Manage-Data-Exchanges" #ADD8E6
  participant "CLI" as cli2
  participant "Web" as web2
  participant "adc" as adc2
end box

actor "actorName" as actor2

actor1 -> cli: adc-global-create()
cli -> adc: global/create()
actor1 -> web: global/create()
web -> adc: global/create()

@enduml
